value_chain_position: Observability and AI-ops platform (Dynatrace) — software-infrastructure layer, providing automated monitoring of cloud-native applications and AI workload performance for enterprises migrating to hyperscaler infrastructure.
relative_comps: DT competes directly with Datadog (DDOG) for cloud observability wallet share; DDOG leads on growth (mid-20s%) and mindshare, while DT holds stronger enterprise accounts in regulated industries. 20% 3-year CAGR and 19% YoY are healthy but below DDOG's pace. FCF margin (26%) is solid and balance sheet is net cash. AI workloads generate observability spend as a side-effect of deployment — DT's Davis AI-engine is a credible differentiator vs. rule-based monitoring alternatives. Defense_tech hint stripped.
